feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1788 201 1587 78
TR 1643 172 1471 63

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Quakeline
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺9,99 → ₺2,99 [₺2,99 ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺2,99

Application Description

After a devastating earthquake strikes Istanbul, can you find the woman you love? In a fully hand-drawn Istanbul, embark on a journey that tests your instincts and hopes. After the earthquake, you must cross the city — from Bakırköy to Üsküdar — to find the woman you love. Explore a hand-drawn, post-quake Istanbul — from shattered historic neighborhoods to the edge of the Bosphorus. Every corner hides new stories and challenges. In the heart of chaos, survival is not enough. You must do it without losing your honor. On your journey to save your girlfriend, you’ll face not only physical obstacles but also emotional and psychological trials. The people you meet among the ruins—and their stories—will push you to make difficult moral choices. To move forward, you’ll need to solve puzzles, crack safe codes, pick locks, explore devastated locations, and manage your energy wisely. Quakeline is more than just a game; it is a project that aims to raise awareness about the possible impact of a real earthquake in Istanbul. Through its fictional yet grounded narrative, the game invites players to reflect on survival, resilience, and the human spirit. Witness the struggle to survive—and the power of hope. In this unforgettable journey, you’ll not only navigate through debris but also discover the deepest and purest parts of what it means to be human.

entry.title: Border Checkpoint Officer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺9,99 → ₺4,99 [₺4,99 ~ ₺9,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺4,99

Application Description

Border Officer – A Document, Control, and Security Game Every day is a new day at the border. Every day, new faces arrive. Behind every face lies a story, a dream… or a threat. Border Officer puts you at the center of the toughest decisions as a border officer in a document control and security game. You must act according to rules, documents, and presidential orders; the cost of a small mistake can be paid by the entire country. Your Mission • Inspect the documents of incoming characters • Examine stamps and detect forged documents • Scan bags using X-ray screening and find illegal items • Identify and capture wanted criminals • Earn money by making the right decisions Scanning, Searching, and Security Not every bag is innocent. Not every document is valid. Protect the border using scanning and search systems. Maintain security—but do not reject the innocent. Sometimes, the right choice is not to follow the rules. Sometimes, the only right choice is the rules. Consequences of Your Decisions Watch the impact of your decisions in the journalist’s broadcast at the end of each day. Some choices satisfy the public; others push the country toward chaos. The border is yours. The decision is yours. The consequences are ours.

entry.title: Way of the Hunter Wild America
entry.id: Way of the Hunter Wild America-tr-1772073783499
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺69,99 → ₺48,99 [₺29,99 ~ ₺69,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺48,99

In-App Purchases

  • Steyr Arms Pack：₺29,99
  • Hunter's Pack：₺20,99

Application Description

Enjoy the first entry of the Way of the Hunter mobile series set in the beautiful North American Pacific Northwest. This authentic hunting experience lets you explore and hunt in large open-world environments in the Nez Perce Valleys, USA. Discover true-to-life animals in beautiful natural habitats and handle various detailed and highly realistic weapons. Way of the Hunter provides a highly immersive, completely integrated experience amongst stunning wildlife with true-to-live animal group behavior. Witness the changing of complex ecosystems that react and adapt to your input. Learn what it means to be a true hunter and put your skills to the test. Face the challenges of ethical hunting, supported by a compelling story, or simply enjoy hunting in rich environments freely. * Dozens of strikingly detailed animal species with realistic behavior models for a genuinely immersive hunting experience * Hunt like a pro with features that highlight animal signs, blood splatter analysis, and shot review with the rewindable bullet camera * Use Hunter Sense to highlight important details and information or deactivate it * Complex Trophy system generates unique antlers and horns based on multiple factors like fitness and age * Sophisticated natural animal animations and reactions when sensing the player's presence * 24-hour day/night cycle with changing wind and weather * Realistic ballistics and bullet physics simulation * A broad selection of firearms and equipment, including licensed gear from Bushnell, Federal, Leupold, Primos, Remington, and Steyr Arms * An in-game economy that lets you hunt game and sell the meat to purchase new gear, hunting passes, and taxidermy for your trophy stands * A compelling story about the struggles of a family hunting business and the rivalry and friendships that surround it * Intuitive photo mode for capturing and sharing your favorite moments * Stalk your prey with a gamepad or touch controls * Optimized mobile controls for comfort and efficiency WARNING: Devices with less than 4 GB of RAM are not supported! You need a device with at least 6 GB of RAM to use the highest graphics settings. Imprint: http://www.handy-games.com/contact/ © www.handy-games.com GmbH

entry.title: Quakeline
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → ₺9,99 [₺5,99 ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺9,99

Application Description

After a devastating earthquake strikes Istanbul, can you find the woman you love? In a fully hand-drawn Istanbul, embark on a journey that tests your instincts and hopes. After the earthquake, you must cross the city — from Bakırköy to Üsküdar — to find the woman you love. Explore a hand-drawn, post-quake Istanbul — from shattered historic neighborhoods to the edge of the Bosphorus. Every corner hides new stories and challenges. In the heart of chaos, survival is not enough. You must do it without losing your honor. On your journey to save your girlfriend, you’ll face not only physical obstacles but also emotional and psychological trials. The people you meet among the ruins—and their stories—will push you to make difficult moral choices. To move forward, you’ll need to solve puzzles, crack safe codes, pick locks, explore devastated locations, and manage your energy wisely. Quakeline is more than just a game; it is a project that aims to raise awareness about the possible impact of a real earthquake in Istanbul. Through its fictional yet grounded narrative, the game invites players to reflect on survival, resilience, and the human spirit. Witness the struggle to survive—and the power of hope. In this unforgettable journey, you’ll not only navigate through debris but also discover the deepest and purest parts of what it means to be human.

Price：₺49,99

Application Description

After a devastating earthquake strikes Istanbul, can you find the woman you love? In a fully hand-drawn Istanbul, embark on a journey that tests your instincts and hopes. After the earthquake, you must cross the city — from Bakırköy to Üsküdar — to find the woman you love. Explore a hand-drawn, post-quake Istanbul — from shattered historic neighborhoods to the edge of the Bosphorus. Every corner hides new stories and challenges. In the heart of chaos, survival is not enough. You must do it without losing your honor. On your journey to save your girlfriend, you’ll face not only physical obstacles but also emotional and psychological trials. The people you meet among the ruins—and their stories—will push you to make difficult moral choices. To move forward, you’ll need to solve puzzles, crack safe codes, pick locks, explore devastated locations, and manage your energy wisely. Quakeline is more than just a game; it is a project that aims to raise awareness about the possible impact of a real earthquake in Istanbul. Through its fictional yet grounded narrative, the game invites players to reflect on survival, resilience, and the human spirit. Witness the struggle to survive—and the power of hope. In this unforgettable journey, you’ll not only navigate through debris but also discover the deepest and purest parts of what it means to be human.

entry.title: Auto Redial App
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Weekly Subscription：₺79,99 → ₺49,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺99,99]
  • Yearly Subscription：₺799,99 → ₺499,99 [₺499,99 ~ ₺1.299,99]

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Pro – Lifetime：₺0,00
  • Weekly Subscription：₺49,99
  • Yearly Subscription：₺499,99

Application Description

With this application, you can make automatic calls to the numbers you want efficiently and in a personalized way. You can define the number of repetitions, the interval between calls, add an extension, activate vibration before dialing, and even schedule your calls using a built-in calendar. Auto Redial App also offers a simple and intuitive interface, detailed call history, and multiple customization options to fit your needs. This application is ideal for anyone who needs to make repetitive calls automatically — such as an appointment call, a busy call retry, or contacting services where the line is busy. Main Features: - Automatically redial busy or unanswered calls. - Set number of retries and time intervals. - Schedule calls in advance via calendar. - Add extensions automatically after dialing. - Enable vibration before each redial. - Call history and retry stats. Perfect for: - Booking appointments (doctors, embassies, etc.) - Customer service or tech support - Calling public offices - Freelancers and business owners following up clients Whether you’re calling to book a doctor’s appointment, reach customer service, or just trying to connect when the line is busy, this app saves time and frustration.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: All In One Memo
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Keep the words, pictures, videos, voice and positions you want to record at any time and anywhere. And there are reminders that you can never forget.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: 玄易-专业天时子平八字排盘六爻占卜风水罗盘
entry.id: 玄易-专业天时子平八字排盘六爻占卜风水罗盘-tr-1771917031691
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺19,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺19,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 月卡会员：₺249,99
  • 年卡会员：₺699,99

Application Description

玄易—專業八字排盤與命理分析工具 玄易是一款功能強大且便捷的八字排盤工具，專為不同需求的用戶量身打造。無論您是八字命理的初學者，還是經驗豐富的命理師，我們都能為您提供精準、專業的命理分析，助您洞悉人生軌跡。 核心功能： 精準八字排盤：輸入生辰，即可一鍵排盤，精準呈現命局資訊，助您快速解讀八字奧秘。 專業斷法知識：內建豐富的八字斷法與解析技巧，幫助您深入理解命理學，提升預測能力。 多盤同批分析：支援同時解析多個命盤，輕鬆對比命理特徵，助力更全面的推斷與研究。 日曆查詢與節氣資訊：整合日曆查詢功能，可查看日干支、節氣變換等重要資訊，精準輔助命理分析。 簡潔直觀，易學易用：優化介面設計，讓複雜的八字分析變得清晰易懂，即使是新手也能快速上手。 為何選擇玄易八字？ 專業精準——演算法嚴謹，數據可靠，助您深度解讀八字奧秘。 學習提升——內建命理知識，幫助初學者快速入門，高手進階提升。 洞察人生——解讀事業、財運、婚姻等多方面命理資訊，把握人生機遇。 玄易讓八字命理觸手可及，助您探索人生玄機！ 立即下載，開啟您的命理探索之旅！

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Island Story: 100 Days
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺99,99 → ₺49,99 [₺39,99 ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

Application Description

You are shipwrecked on a desert island. ﻿ ■ Survival • Eating only wild fruits will not fill your stomach. • Catch fish in a mini-game, or craft traps for meat. ﻿ ■ Realistic Health System • Staying healthy is a constant struggle. • Manage a complex system of needs: weight, wounds, hunger, thirst, energy, body temperature, insect bites… ﻿ ■ Upgrade Your Camp • Gather resources to craft tools and build furniture. ﻿ ■ Dynamic Weather • Changing weather limits your movements and can disrupt daily plans. ﻿ ■ Self-Sufficient Living • Learn to grow crops, raise goats, and bake bread from scratch. ﻿ ■ Relaxation • Immerse yourself in natural white noise. --------- Play Offline · No Ads

entry.title: Thumper: Pocket Edition
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → ₺199,99 [₺39,99 ~ ₺249,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺199,99

Application Description

*** Winner of Apple Design Award 2019 *** Thumper is rhythm violence: classic action, blistering speed, and brutal physicality. You are a space beetle. Brave the void and confront a maniacal giant head. With this special pocket edition, you can play all nine epic levels with one hand. Hurtle forward, master new moves, and survive terrifying boss battles. Propelled by a pounding original soundtrack, you'll feel every crushing impact. To reach synesthetic bliss, you must conquer rhythm hell. ■ Features ■ ・ Nine epic levels ・ Adrenalizing boss battles ・ Psychedelic visuals and original soundtrack ・ Smooth 60 FPS in portrait and landscape (and up to 120 FPS on supported devices) ・ PLAY + mode (increased challenge and speed) ・ Full screen display on iPhone X ・ iCloud Sync ■ Please Note ■ Wireless headphones can add significant audio latency. For the best experience, wired headphones or integrated speakers are strongly recommended.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Astrea: Six-Sided Oracles
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺499,99 → ₺399,99 [₺399,99 ~ ₺499,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺399,99

Application Description

Astrea is a DICE-deck-building roguelike that flips the script on deckbuilders by using dice instead of cards and an unique dual “damage” system: Purification vs Corruption. Features • Unique dual “damage” system: Purification vs Corruption - In Astrea there is a new type of “damage” system. Purification can be used to damage enemies or heal yourself. On the other hand, corruption can be used to damage yourself or heal the enemies. Pacify enemies through Purification, or Corrupt yourself to unleash abilities that help tip the scales. • Dynamic Health Bar system - With skills attached to your health bar, you can take Corruption to enable these skills and unleash powerful abilities. But be careful, if you take too much Corruption you will be consumed by it. • Not cards, but dice! - Build a dice pool that fits your playstyle. Choose from over 350 dice and three dice types; reliably safe, perfectly balanced, or powerfully risky. A dice type system designed with high-risk, high-reward in its core. • Customize your dice - Forge your fate by editing die faces with new actions, tipping the odds of powerful results into your favor. • Choose from Six Brave Oracles - Each possessing their own unique dice sets, abilities, and playstyles. From ingenious spellcasters to brutish berserkers, whether you like beating the opponent into submission or outsmarting them with clever plays, there’s an oracle for you. • Uncover over 170 modifying Blessings - Imbue your Oracle with unique passives yielding potent effects that changes up your fundamental tactics. Choose between Star Blessings, passive effects with lower power, or Black Hole Blessings, powerful passive effects with a drawback.

entry.title: Computer Basics: PC Guide
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → ₺49,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

Application Description

The application contains a variety of articles and tips for anyone who works with computer technology or is simply interested in it. It is divided into three sections: 1. Hardware 2. PC assembly 3. Software The Hardware section contains information about all computer components, peripherals, and other equipment. The basic theory of computer parts is explained in simple language. Here you will find articles about% the motherboard, central processor, RAM, graphics card, and other hardware. Hardware topics include: • Motherboard, central processing unit, random access memory, power supply unit, graphics card, optical disk drive, sound card, cooling systems, computer cases • Hard disk drives (HDD), solid-state drives (SSD), optical disks, USB flash drives • Keyboards, mice, webcams, microphones, image scanners • Monitors, speakers, headphones, printers, projectors • Network interface controllers, routers, mobile broadband modems • Gaming devices, uninterruptible power supplies, peripheral connectors The PC assembly section offers step-by-step guides and illustrated instructions on how to build your own computer or replace its components. Detailed diagrams and pictures will help you understand how to assemble a PC, install or upgrade equipment, and fit components. PC assembly topics include: • Motherboard installation • CPU installation • Applying and replacing thermal paste • Installing a graphics card, RAM modules, power supply, air cooling system, sound card, SSD, or HDD The Software section provides information about computer operating systems and the basic programs that most PC users work with. Software topics include: • Operating systems • Essential programs This application is ideal for anyone who wants to improve or refresh their knowledge of computer technology. After completing the course, you will be able to assemble your own computer or upgrade it confidently. The app contains more than 50 articles and includes a search function for terms and definitions. We regularly update the course on computer fundamentals. You can also report errors or suggest improvements.
